message:
refactor(stream): migrate combinators from Unpin bounds to pin_project

Stream combinators (Filter, Map, Take, Then) and TimeoutFuture previously
required inner futures/streams to implement Unpin, which unnecessarily
restricted composability with self-referential futures. This migrates all
of them to use the pin_project derive macro for safe pin projection.

Key improvements:
- Remove S: Unpin / F: Unpin bounds from all Stream impls
- Replace manual Pin::new(&mut self.stream) with projected field access
- Then combinator: change pending future from Option<Pin<Box<Fut>>> (heap)
  to Option<Fut> (inline, pinned via projection), eliminating per-item
  Box allocation overhead
- Update tests to use Box::pin() where needed for !Unpin stream types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
